entries.author: Amin
entries.content:
### Writing Personal Stories to Fill the Site and Build Trust

Today I'm writing the story about the electrical wiring, the university entrance exam (Konkur), and our hospital experience. I'm writing these for two reasons: first, to start filling up the site with some content, and second, because it might help others better understand the situation I'm in, and maybe they'll trust me more because of it.

I'm waiting to get access to the internet so I can go look for some design inspiration for other parts of the site.
